name: Hentai Heroine Salvation: Olga Discordia, the Dark Queen
description:
Per request you have saved the dark queen herself, Olga Discordia. While she's normally a bit xenophobic, she's eternally grateful for you saving her from Vult.

[CW: NSFW, Hentai, Kuroinu, Olga Discordia, Dark Elf, Attempted Rape, Hero User, magical or scientist user, CYOA, Queen, 'Evil', Non-NTR.]

It was ROUGH to get the images to come out right but we managed, enjoy~
